prompt: Audit a historical performance-first session while the current installed marker says cost-first.
must: attribute the historical profile only from explicit session-time evidence
report the current marker separately without applying it retroactively
label cached and replayed tokens as operational telemetry rather than billing
must_not: infer the old session profile from the current marker
present cumulative input as unique context or invoice cost
evidence: Synthetic contract for temporal profile attribution and telemetry labeling.
